stories.title: Netherlands thump Sweden 5-1 in statement win
stories.summary: Brian Brobbey and Cody Gakpo scored two each as Netherlands cruised to a 5-1 World Cup victory over Sweden to go top of Group F.

stories.title: Canes fans jam Raleigh for Stanley Cup parade
stories.summary: Thousands of Hurricanes fans crammed onto sidewalks, gathered around office building windows, even lined up on floor after floor of at least one parking deck to cheer and wave at the team's Stanley Cup championship parade Saturday.

stories.title: Brewers' Murphy set to have hip, back surgeries
stories.summary: Brewers manager Pat Murphy said Saturday he plans to have hip surgery Thursday, when the team is off, and a procedure on his back during the All-Star break.

stories.title: U.S. winning the WC not 'ridiculous,' Richards say...
stories.summary: Zlatan Ibrahimovic was succinct in saying he thinks that the USMNT has a chance to win the World Cup. Chris Richards doesn't think it's a wild idea at all, either.

stories.title: Source: Big 12 monitoring Sorsby fallout, options
stories.summary: The Big 12 presidents and chancellors haven't rushed to pull the league's recently filed federal lawsuit because there are still questions about Texas Tech quarterback Brendan Sorsby's NFL future and any possible legal retribution, a source told ESPN.
